gross_margin_protection: Low — power users erode margin at flat rate
biggest_risk: Agents don't consume seats; revenue ceiling hits early as AI automates tasks

gross_margin_protection: High — costs and revenue move proportionally
revenue_predictability: Low — variable invoices create forecast risk
sales_complexity: Medium — requires buyer education on consumption
nrr_potential: High — usage naturally expands with adoption
enterprise_fit: Medium — finance teams resist variable invoices
biggest_risk: Revenue unpredictability; complex credit packaging required to satisfy enterprise procurement

charge_basis: Per verified business result (e.g. per resolved ticket)
best_fit_product_type: Customer support deflection; lead qualification; contract review
gross_margin_protection: Medium — margin depends on AI success rate and failure-state compute cost
revenue_predictability: Low — revenue tied to AI performance variance
sales_complexity: High — attribution definitions require legal-grade contract work
nrr_potential: High — buyers love paying only for results
enterprise_fit: Medium — disputes over attribution slow collections
biggest_risk: Silent failures still consume inference compute; attribution disputes increase days-sales-outstanding
real_world_example: Intercom Fin ($0.99 per resolved ticket); Harvey AI (per contract)

charge_basis: Percentage of fully loaded human salary for equivalent role
best_fit_product_type: Autonomous agents clearly replacing or augmenting a specific human role
gross_margin_protection: High — positioned against salary not software spend
revenue_predictability: Medium — tied to headcount replacement decisions
sales_complexity: High — requires strong ROI proof and procurement education
nrr_potential: Medium — renewal depends on proved replacement value
buyer_budget_tapped: HR / headcount budget (10x larger than IT budget)
biggest_risk: Requires demonstrable role replacement; fails as copilot framing; premium buyer expectations

charge_basis: Fixed platform fee + metered overage above included tier
best_fit_product_type: Enterprise AI platforms; products with variable compute demand
gross_margin_protection: High — platform fee covers fixed costs; overage protects against heavy users
revenue_predictability: High — platform fee = guaranteed ARR; overage = expansion upside
sales_complexity: High — quota design and overage pricing require careful structuring
nrr_potential: High — overage is a natural expansion motion
enterprise_fit: High — platform fee satisfies finance; usage aligns with engineering
biggest_risk: Complexity in quota design; overage pricing optics can trigger buyer anxiety if not framed well
real_world_example: Salesforce Agentforce; Hubspot AI tiers; Databricks
